name: HGSOC fingerprint is PROGNOSTIC, not PREDICTIVE

source_receipts.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)
source_receipts.anchor: HGSOC fingerprint is PROGNOSTIC, not PREDICTIVE

verbatim_evidence.claim: HR=0.7208 describes survival under heterogeneous standard-of-care. It does NOT predict response to any specific therapy. Any patient-selection or treatment-assignment claim requires prospective, treatment-stratified validation on the intended endpoint. Never state the fingerprint 'predicts response' or 'selects patients for [drug]'.
